title: centaurea × numantina
intro: Centaurea × numantina, also known as Blue Spur Gentian or Numantian Cornflower, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been shown to have analgesic and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Centaurea × numantina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Centaurea × numantina can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its roots and leaves are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions.
